zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sergeaux於大約1378年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 馬比時，她的父親Sir Richard Sergeaux II50歲，母親Phillipa Arundel29歲。她於1388年7月1日與Sir William Marney在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年8月之前在英國英格蘭艾可萊也 芒尼，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可萊也 芒尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Sergeaux于大约1378年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 馬比时，她的父亲Sir Richard Sergeaux II50岁，母亲Phillipa Arundel29岁。她于1388年7月1日与Sir William Marney在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年8月之前在英国英格兰艾可萊也 芒尼，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可萊也 芒尼。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sergeaux was born about 1378, in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, was 50 and her mother, Phillipa Arundel, was 29. She married Sir William Marney on 1 July 1388, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before August 1414, in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Sergeaux est née environ 1378, à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Phillipa Arundel, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Marney le 1 juillet 1388, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant août 1414, à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Sergeaux um 1378 in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Sergeaux II 50 und ihre Mutter Phillipa Arundel 29. Sie hat am 1. Juli 1388 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir William Marney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor August 1414 in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sergeaux è nata il circa 1378 nel St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Phillipa Arundel, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Marney il 1 luglio 1388, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del agosto 1414, nel Layer Marney, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Layer Marney, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sergeauxが約1378年にイギリスコルンワルスト マブインで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Sergeaux IIは50歳，母Phillipa Arundelは29歳であった。1388年7月1日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSir William Marneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年8月以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーで死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sergeaux(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 코른월 스트 마빈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Sergeaux II(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phillipa Arundel(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1388년 7월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir William Marney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 8월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 레이어 마니에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 레이어 마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sergeaux nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Phillipa Arundel, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Marney em 1 de julho de 1388, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes agosto de 1414, em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sergeaux родилась около 1378 г. в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Sergeaux II было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipa Arundel, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Marney 1 июля 1388 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед августа 1414 г. в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
